1888480.name: Wild Radio Flux
1888480.description:
Like a short Message in a Bottle...

Like a little Star in the Darkness...


INTRODUCTION 

Fight for the full freedom of expression and thought, embrace the passion to reshape a future that rekindles the spirit of our past, a time rich in music, dreams, and boundless possibilities. Explore vast game worlds, grow your character, collect iconic musical relics, and carve your own destiny!

FEATURES

  • Loading/Saving system with screenshot, date and time per slot

  • Sliding movements to overpass enemies and dangerous obstacles

  • Sliding Dash and Air Dash movements

  • Advanced Sliding Dash and Air Dash movements

  • Progressive gameplay: grow your character experience, weapons and power.

  • Randomly unlock new stages

  • Double jump and slide mechanics

  • Explore and collect iconic music items all around the levels

  • A tri-directional power attack system based on your skill, weapons and character experience

  • Music, sound and soundtrack options

STORY

In a world overrun by the psychological and social turmoil engineered by ruthless tech giants, humanity stands on the brink. These corporations, driven by insatiable greed, manipulate entire populations to secure their immense profits.

Human connections and emotions have been surrendered to a pervasive technology that has fused with every aspect of life. Social unrest and a barrage of false news have become the ultimate weapons, wielded by companies and governments alike to destabilize democracies and control the masses.

A dystopian alternative present time? No, this is the world we all live in today!

Wild Radio Flux takes players back to a time filled with vibrant music, colors, imagination, and endless fun, a time when people left their homes every day to embark on new adventures, embracing the thrill of life and dreaming of their own unique futures.

Wild Radio Flux invites you to travel back, at least for fun, to a hypothetical "1985,". It will be your mission to collect as many musical and cultural items as possible to stop the dystopian technological drift, before tech giants and big data corporations have infiltrated our lives, relentlessly driving us to transfer our existence onto their servers.

GAMEPLAY

Explore diverse stages, unlock new levels, and advance through the game as you collect legendary items and power up your hero. Discover and unleash a range of unique weapons while immersing yourself in the nostalgic dream of 16-bit gaming, where music and adventure collide in an endless, unforgettable experience.

Press JUMP twice for a double jump

Press RIGHT or LEFT twice to overpass dangerous obstacles

And slide behind Enemies

EMPOWER YOUR WEAPONS

Based on the character you choose, you can empower your crazy weapons while playing.
1888480.supported_languages: 英语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 德语, 简体中文
